categories.title: Misty Forests
categories.description: Quiet tree lines, damp fog, and low-contrast woodland depth that leaves room for reflective text.

categories.title: Moonlit Lakes
categories.description: Still water, moon paths, and soft shore silhouettes for slower memory and writing states.

categories.title: Night Skies
categories.description: Stars, dark gradients, and spacious celestial scenes that keep the room feeling open instead of busy.

categories.title: Cozy Desks
categories.description: Coffee, keyboards, lamps, and notebook corners that pair well with active project and now cards.

categories.title: Arcade Glow
categories.description: Subtle cabinet rows, neon spill, and warm-magenta atmosphere without turning into a loud game poster.

categories.title: CRT Reflections
categories.description: Monitor glass, scanline mood, and dim reflections suited to haunted and tech-adjacent signals.

categories.title: Rain On Windows
categories.description: Soft bokeh, wet glass, and urban weather for contemplative and low-stimulation states.

categories.title: Vinyl & Headphones
categories.description: Warm listening-room scenes that support music-adjacent cards without demanding too much attention.

categories.title: Books & Notebooks
categories.description: Paper, pens, and desk-night reading imagery that complements writing and thought states.

categories.title: Quiet Cat Silhouettes
categories.description: Indirect cat presence for non-cat cards when a touch of life helps without competing with the real cat rooms.

categories.title: Atmospheric City Streets
categories.description: Wet pavement, distant lights, and empty-night walking energy that stays calm enough for text overlays.

categories.title: Warm Lamps & Shadows
categories.description: Lamplight, corners, and negative space meant to make text-heavy Ambient cards feel inhabited.
